key_findings: Stuck detection is alert-only (120s threshold), NOT auto-recovery; orphan recovery only when no live agents remain (180s)
No automatic worker restart on crash or kill; manual --teardown is only recovery option
README documentation does not match actual recovery implementation
Smoke tests cover ONLY happy path; zero coverage for failure or recovery scenarios
Failure containment exists (isolated panes, Depth Guard, metaswarm cap) but no active watchdog
critical_gaps: No --resume or --restart CLI flags despite recovery narrative in docs
No PID-based liveness despite PIDS_DIR being declared
Dead-worker re-queue only in edge case (all agents gone plus 180s stale)
Test coverage for recovery scenarios is zero percent
